home.bio: I build web applications that look good — landing pages, e-commerces, platforms and different types of projects. Two years developing for clients. Not just code: design, visual identity and user experience.
home.studyingValue: University Technical Degree in Programming — UTN (Universidad Tecnológica Nacional)

about.webDevDesc1: I build web applications that solve real business problems. Two years developing e-commerces and platforms for real clients — straight into production, with full ownership of the outcome. My approach combines software engineering with a practical business mindset: I understand both the technical architecture and the impact the software has on the client's operations. Beyond the code, I handle the full design: visual identity, user experience, and brand communication.
about.projectEspacioVina: Home & deco e-commerce with product catalog, order management, and admin panel. Pair project with Nico Alvez — I handled the frontend and all design decisions: color palette and typography. First time working with another developer and touching a real backend: PHP from scratch.
about.projectMigaClub: Landing page and dashboard for a miga sandwich club. Full brand ownership: logo, color palette, typography, illustrated storefront, and all site graphics. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — a deliberate choice to keep it dependency-free.
about.projectLaBasica: Online pastry shop with shopping cart and admin dashboard. End-to-end design and development: color palette, typography, animations, and full shopping experience. React and TypeScript with strict typing — in a domain with many product variations, that prevents silent errors and makes the catalog easier to maintain.
about.projectPortfolio: This site. React, TypeScript, and Vite. Minimalist design with three-language support.
about.techFrontend: Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
about.techTools: Tools: Git, GitHub, Vite, VS Code, Vercel, Figma
about.techDesign: Design: Visual identity, UI/UX, responsive design, web accessibility
about.techAI: AI: Claude (development), GPT and Gemini (documentation and editing) — as accelerators, not substitutes
about.utnSubtitle: Repositories of coursework and assignments by subject →
about.educationUTN: University Technical Degree in Programming (TUPaD) — UTN, in progress
about.educationSelfTaught: Self-taught in web development: two years building real client projects
about.shortBio1: Franco Kaddour is a web developer from Buenos Aires, Argentina. Two years building web applications with React, TypeScript, and Node.js for real clients — e-commerces, platforms, and brand websites.
about.shortBio2: He works independently and handles both development and design: color palettes, typography, and visual identity. Studies the University Technical Degree in Programming (TUPaD) at UTN.
about.availabilityNote: Available for freelance projects and remote collaborations.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Five real projects. End-to-end design and development. All in production.
projects.espacioVinaDesc: The client had no digital system — every order was manual. I built the full frontend of their e-commerce: product catalog, order management, and admin panel. I also handled the entire visual identity. First time working with a real backend (PHP + MySQL) in collaboration with another developer.
projects.migaClubDesc: The client needed to stand out in a crowded market without an agency budget. Solution: full visual identity from scratch — logo, palette, typography, illustrations, and website. Result: coherent brand across web and social. Built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks, maximum load speed.
projects.laBasicaDesc: The bakery had no web presence to match the quality of their product. I designed and built a complete online store — visual identity, product catalog, shopping cart, and admin panel. React + TypeScript with strict typing to handle catalog variations with precision. End-to-end design and development.
projects.portfolioDesc: This portfolio. React, TypeScript, and Vite. Minimalist design with three-language support.
projects.monitoreoDesc: Environmental monitoring system in Python — integrative project for the TUPaD UTN program. Sensor data collection, processing, and real-time chart visualization.

contact.introText: Have a project in mind? Send me a message and I'll reply within 24 hours.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent! I'll reply within 24 hours.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. You can email me directly at francokaddour@gmail.com
